Valentine’s Day Deal

 

15% off supplements for heart & circulation

Valentine’s Day is the perfect time to give a little extra love – both to yourself and your heart. That’s why during Valentine’s weekend, February 13 through February 15, you get 15% off selected dietary supplements for heart and circulation. Developed to support circulation, blood vessels, and the heart’s normal function. Enter the code LOVE15 at checkout to take advantage of the offer. Stock is limited, first come, first served.

[LOVE15](https://www.greatlife.eu/offers)

[Give your heart the love it deserves](https://www.greatlife.eu/offers)

 

 

[Omega 3](https://www.greatlife.eu/wild-alaskan-sockeye-salmon)

Wild Alaskan Sockeye Salmon – Omega 3
– contributes to the normal function of the heart
 
Reg. price €35,99
NOW €30,60
 
Omega-3 reduces low-grade inflammation, improves vascular elasticity, lowers triglycerides, and supports normal heart rhythm. Especially important in cases of high blood pressure, atherosclerosis, and inflammatory burden.
 
"I’m very particular about the quality of supplements, and Alaska Omega-3 is the best I’ve found on the market." – Christina

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/wild-alaskan-sockeye-salmon)

 

[CoQ10](https://www.greatlife.eu/coq10-200-mg)

[Magnesium M4](https://www.greatlife.eu/magnesium-greatlife)

CoQ10
– plays an important role in the body’s energy production
 
Reg. price €54,99
NOW €46,75
 
The heart is the body’s most energy-demanding muscle. CoQ10 is required for mitochondrial ATP production and also acts as an antioxidant. Particularly relevant with aging, statin use, high blood pressure, and heart failure.

Magnesium M4
– for normal heart rhythm and blood pressure regulation
 
Reg. price €36,99
NOW €31,45
 
Essential for normal heart rhythm, relaxation of vessel walls, and blood pressure regulation. Magnesium deficiency is very common and linked to arrhythmias, angina, and high blood pressure.

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/coq10-200-mg)

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/magnesium-greatlife)

 

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/offers)

 

The heart is amazing

 

A strong heart begins with healthy vessels

Did you know that the heart pumps about five liters of blood in five minutes and in one hour will have pumped around 300 liters of blood with the help of approximately 4,200 heartbeats?

Vascular problems can be the beginning of more serious cardiovascular conditions and should be taken seriously. Contact our customer service at [info@greatlife.eu](mailto:info@greatlife.eu) and we will help you with free dietary advice, self-care advice, and health protocols.

[Contact us →](mailto:info@greatlife.eu)

[Shop now →](https://www.greatlife.eu/offers)

 

[Vitamin D3](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-d3-2000-greatlife)

[Oyster Pure](https://www.greatlife.eu/oyster-pure)

Vitamin D3 with K2
– counteracts calcification in vessels and valves
 
Reg. price €21,99
NOW €18,70
 
Vitamin K2 directs calcium to the skeleton and away from the blood vessels. Important for counteracting calcification in vessels and valves, especially in combination with vitamin D.

Oyster Pure
– contains important trace elements for antioxidant defense
 
Reg. price €72,99
NOW €62,05
 
Contains zinc, copper, and selenium, trace elements needed for antioxidant defense, normal lipid metabolism, and hormonal signaling that indirectly affects the heart and blood vessels. 

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-d3-2000-greatlife)

 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/oyster-pure)

The offer is valid through February 15, 2026. Applies to selected dietary supplements from our own brand Greatlife. Enter the discount code LOVE15 at checkout. The discount cannot be combined with other discount codes. We reserve the right for items to sell out.
